title: chenopodium latifolium subsp. rectum
intro: Chenopodium latifolium subsp. rectum is a subspecies of the Chenopodium latifolium plant, commonly known as Goosefoot, a perennial herb belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Chenopodium latifolium subsp. rectum include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce oxidative stress, alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Chenopodium latifolium subsp. rectum are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
